results.matched_effect_cluster: Memory Bank Compression discrete codebook retrieval
results.justification: EXACT TWIN — documents quantized to discrete codebook + stored in memory bank + retrieved by code lookup IS the ADINKRA-CATALOG fixed-K canonical-symbol memory bank mechanism.

results.matched_effect_cluster: A-MEM agentic memory structured attribute embedding
results.justification: A-MEM agentic memory with structured attributes + embedding-similarity retrieval covers the catalog-with-paired-token retrieval paradigm.
Long-term memory benchmark + enhancement covers the memory-bank augmentation paradigm.
Vector-store RAG with similarity retrieval IS the canonical mechanism ADINKRA-CATALOG specializes.
AI Memory landscape covers concept-vector + retrieval + memory-native system design.

results.matched_effect_cluster: Vector DB Survey LLM context augmentation
results.justification: Vector-DB-for-LLM survey covers RAG augmentation with concept-vector lookup.
VQToken with compact discrete codebook + token-hash IS the fixed-K codebook mechanism.

results.matched_effect_cluster: ICLR 2026 discrete codebook concept token attention probe
results.justification: EXACT TWIN — discrete codebook concept-tokens with attention-probe retrieval IS the ADINKRA-CATALOG mechanism.
